_comment: Layer-2 MEMORY-EXTERNALIZATION deep research: LFM2.5-8B-A1B via Ollama on a T4. Same bounded-context openclaw.context block as lfm2_ollama_research.json (Layer-1 pruning), but here the lever is Layer 2: the agent is instructed (DEEP_RESEARCH_SKILL + LEAN_AGENTS_MD) to WRITE each distilled finding to memory and RECALL earlier findings via memory_search/memory_get instead of restating them inline — so the SHARED-SESSION transcript stays bounded no matter how many steps accumulate. memory_search_provider is 'none' = OpenClaw's no-egress in-process BM25 index (no network, no key); we deliberately do NOT use 'local' because that pulls a ~0.6GB embedding model into the ephemeral Colab VM. Run with examples/web_research_memory.json (mode research, shared-session, several accumulating steps). See memory: openclaw-context-bestpractice.
